kp3:1.1:
hair of the head, hair of the body, nails, teeth, skin, muscle, tendons, bones,
bone marrow, spleen, heart, liver, membranes, kidneys, lungs, large intestines,
small intestines, gorge, feces, gall, phlegm, lymph, blood, sweat, fat,
tears, oil, saliva, mucus, oil in the joints, urine, brain in the skull.
